title: S3 Vectors Cutover for Semantic Reinforcement Memory
description: Add S3 Vectors to the prototype CDK stack while keeping the existing OpenSearch vector store available. Then cut Semantic Reinforcement Memory runtime over to S3 Vectors and validate with real-world report runs.

comments.author: unknown
